LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEPHEN BREATHOUR NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM MAY-08-2014 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JUN-19-2014, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER AGREEMENT OF ALL PARTIES. (D302)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT STEPHEN BREATHOUR'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION TO VACATE FILED ON MAY 12, 2014, THE COURT ISSUED AN ORDER ON MAY 20, 2014 VACATING JUDGMENT ON THE SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT STEPHEN BREATHOUR's Motion To Vacate Judgment On Sister-State Judgment is Off calendar. Pursuant to the stipulation to vacate filed on May 12, 2014, the Court issued an order on May 20, 2014 vacating judgment on the sister-state judgment. Judge: John K. Stewart, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JKS
